question: ## Permissions Review\nConfirm the saved search has the right owner, sharing scope, and role permissions for its operational purpose.
Is the sharing scope appropriate (private/app/global)?
description: Private searches are easy to lose; global searches should be justified.

question: Is the owner the right person or role for ongoing maintenance?
description: Prefer durable ownership such as a team/service account where possible.

question: Are read permissions limited to the right roles?
description: Confirm sensitive search logic or data access is not overexposed.

question: Are write permissions limited to the right roles?
description: Only maintainers should be able to alter production detections.

question: Permissions review notes
description: Record ownership changes, permission fixes, or approvals.
